title: Rare Fish Finder
description: Easily spot and collect rare tropical fish variants with glowing outlines and variant names. Perfect for aquarium builders and fish collectors!
body:
# Rare Fish Finder
![Glowing fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81f7443646d6ff2027c82321a47e21fe8a044b0d_0.webp)
Easily spot and collect rare tropical fish variants with glowing outlines and variant names. Perfect for aquarium builders and fish collectors!
